field.label: Enable BradSearch Autocomplete
field.comment: When enabled, replaces native search autocomplete

field.label: Public Key
field.comment: BradSearch public API key for this store view

field.label: Configuration JSON
field.comment: JSON config forwarded to the autocomplete web component. All keys are optional — only specify overrides. Available keys: apiConfig (url, limit, fields, mapping), options (width, cardView, threshold, showHeader, columns, highlights, condensed, currency), translations (noData, categories, buttonLoadMore, loading, error, sku, brand, priceNoTax, priceWithTax, etc.), styles (error, button, global, filters, highlights, productCard), overrideStyles (CSS string), scriptUrl, searchInputSelector, redirectUrl, categoryFilterCodes. Example: {"apiConfig": {"url": "https://api.bradsearch.com/api/v1/store/query"}, "options": {"currency": "SEK"}, "categoryFilterCodes": ["abc123"]}
